# Weight 2 FIT - Generate Weight Scale FIT Files

Weight 2 FIT is a privacy-first tool to import body composition measurements from any source into Garmin Connect, without compromising account security or sharing data with third-party servers.

**Website:** https://weight2fit.marcelorodrigo.com

## Overview

Weight 2 FIT generates standard Garmin FIT weight-scale files directly in your browser. Your data never leaves your device—100% client-side processing using the official Garmin FIT SDK.

### Core Features

- **Privacy-First Design** — Your data stays on your device. No third-party servers, no data relay.
- **100% Client-Side** — Powered by the official Garmin FIT SDK running entirely in your browser.
- **Standard FIT Format** — Creates legitimate Garmin FIT files compatible with all Garmin services.
- **No Account Compromise** — You control when and what gets imported into Garmin Connect.
- **Open Source** — Free and open source on GitHub. View code, report issues, and contribute.

## How It Works

Weight 2 FIT solves a common problem: most third-party sync tools for body scales and Garmin Connect either require you to disable two-factor authentication or relay your health data through their own servers.

The solution is simple:

1. **Enter your data** — Body composition measurements (weight is required; body fat %, bone mass, muscle mass, hydration, visceral fat, metabolic age, and other metrics are optional).

2. **Generate & download** — The app encodes your data into a standard Garmin FIT file using the official Garmin JavaScript FIT SDK, running entirely in your browser.

3. **Import into Garmin Connect** — Go to connect.garmin.com, navigate to Health Stats → Body Composition, and use the import button to upload the .fit file.

## Supported Metrics

The generator accepts the following body composition measurements:

**Required:**
- Weight (kg)

**Optional:**
- BMI (kg/m²)
- Body Fat (%)
- Body Water / Hydration (%)
- Visceral Fat Mass (kg)
- Bone Mass (kg)
- Muscle Mass (kg)
- Basal Metabolic Rate (kcal/day)
- Active Metabolic Rate (kcal/day)
- Metabolic Age (years)
- Physique Rating (1-9 scale)
- Visceral Fat Rating (1-9 scale)

## Pages

- [Home](https://weight2fit.marcelorodrigo.com/) — Introduction and call-to-action to the Weight Scale FIT Generator.
- [Weight Generator](https://weight2fit.marcelorodrigo.com/weight) — Interactive form to input body composition data and generate FIT files.
- [About](https://weight2fit.marcelorodrigo.com/about) — Detailed explanation of the problem, solution, how it works, and why this approach is better.
- [Fields Reference](https://weight2fit.marcelorodrigo.com/fields) — Technical documentation of FIT file fields supported.

## Technology Stack

- **Framework:** Nuxt 4 (SPA mode, no server-side rendering)
- **UI:** Nuxt UI v4, TailwindCSS v4
- **FIT SDK:** Garmin JavaScript FIT SDK (@garmin/fitsdk)
- **TypeScript:** Fully typed application
- **Testing:** Vitest 4
- **SEO:** Nuxt SEO (@nuxtjs/seo)

## Disclaimer

Weight 2 FIT is an independent, open-source project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Garmin Ltd. or any other fitness device manufacturer.

"Garmin" and related trademarks are the property of Garmin Ltd. This tool generates standard FIT format files that can be imported into compatible devices and applications.

The FIT SDK library used by this tool is provided by Garmin Ltd. under its own license.

## Links

- **GitHub:** https://github.com/marcelorodrigo/weight2fit
- **Live Site:** https://weight2fit.marcelorodrigo.com
- **Garmin Connect:** https://connect.garmin.com
